title: Create & Cultivate
description: Become a farmer in this chill, peaceful Create modpack!
body:
![Create & Cultivate in big Minecraft font](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e328d943a121f73139508fe3612273a9e235823f.png)

# Create & Cultivate!

Create & Cultivate is a chill, relaxing **farming modpack** with mods such as Create and Farmer's delight!  
There's also a season system using *Serene Seasons*, so different crops will grow at different times of year.

This pack is meant to have fun, so there isn't really a set progression.

Mod highlights:
- Create
- Farmer's Delight
- Geophilic
- Serene Seasons

I really hope you enjoy my pack
> StikyPiston (:
